title: ItemChat
description: Showcase your items to the chat with a simple keybind!
body:
### Item chat is a mod that allows you to showcase your items to the chat with a simple keybind!
Just hit Shift + T while hovering over an item on your inventory. This mod is a port of a feature from Quark (by Vazkii) to a standalone mod.
The mod is for 1.16 / 1.18.2 Forge.
Port to 1.18.2 made by OgelGames.
